data.name: NoImage
data.value: Drag and drop or click to open

data.name: PreloadMemoryBudgetTooltip
data.value: Memory budget for full decode and preloading

data.name: AggressivePreloadTooltip
data.value: Preload farther ahead and use more background work.

data.name: BalancedPreloadTooltip
data.value: A middle ground between speed and memory use.

data.name: ConservativePreloadTooltip
data.value: Use less background work and memory.

data.name: NearestUpscalingTooltip
data.value: Use sharp, pixelated scaling when zooming in.

data.name: OptionsHelpDialogText
data.value:
Upscaling controls how images are enlarged past their natural size. Smooth looks softer; nearest keeps hard pixel edges.
Preload nearby images decodes likely next and previous images in the background.
Preload memory limits how much RAM cached images may use.
Preload aggressiveness controls how far ahead Mangosteen scans and how eagerly it warms images.

data.name: OptionsHelpTooltip
data.value: Explain image display and preloading options.

data.name: PreloadAggressivenessTooltip
data.value: Choose how far ahead Mangosteen looks and how eagerly it warms images.

data.name: PreloadMemoryBudgetOptionTooltip
data.value: Choose the decoded-image cache memory budget.

data.name: PreloadNearbyImagesTooltip
data.value: Decode likely next and previous images in the background.

data.name: SmoothUpscalingTooltip
data.value: Use smoother interpolation when zooming in.

data.name: UpscalingTooltip
data.value: Choose how images are enlarged when zoomed past actual size.

data.name: AutoRefreshCurrentImageTooltip
data.value: Reload the current image when the file changes on disk.

data.name: CheckForUpdatesTooltip
data.value: Check GitHub Releases for a newer version.

data.name: NoUpdatesAvailableFormat
data.value:
Mangosteen is up to date.
Current version: {0}

data.name: UpdateAvailableInstalledFormat
data.value:
Mangosteen {0} is available. You are using {1}.
Download and run the installer now? Mangosteen will close after the installer starts.

data.name: UpdateAvailablePortableFormat
data.value:
Mangosteen {0} is available. You are using {1}.
Portable builds cannot update in place. Open the GitHub Releases page?

data.name: UpdateCheckFailedFormat
data.value:
The update operation could not finish.
{0}

data.name: UpdateInstallerMissing
data.value: The latest release does not include a Windows installer yet.

data.name: LossyRotationWarning
data.value: This image uses lossy compression. Saving the rotation will recompress it and may reduce image quality. Do you want to continue?

data.name: PngCopyOnlyWarning
data.value: This format cannot be safely overwritten. Save the rotated image as a PNG copy instead?

data.name: RotatedCopyExistsFormat
data.value: A file named "{0}" already exists. Replace it?

data.name: KeepReadyInBackground
data.value: Keep Mangosteen ready in the background

data.name: KeepReadyInBackgroundTooltip
data.value: Starts Mangosteen with Windows and keeps the viewer ready. Closing the window returns it to the background; File > Exit quits it completely.

data.name: RunningInstanceUnavailable
data.value: Mangosteen is already running, but the existing instance could not be reached.

data.name: StartupRegistrationFailedFormat
data.value: Windows startup could not be updated: {0}
